description: Curated consulting presentation taxonomy for the EY AI Pitch Intelligent Narrative Planner. Each presentation type defines the default consulting narrative, slide sequence, audience, and extension points for variants, business functions, and optional slides. Classification keywords and matching logic are intentionally kept outside this file, in presentation_classifier.py.

Transformation Proposal.description: A recommendation deck that defines a change program, contrasts current and future states, and secures stakeholder alignment and funding.
Transformation Proposal.objective: Secure alignment and approval for a prioritized {business_function} transformation program at {company}.
Transformation Proposal.expected_audience: {company}'s {business_function} executive sponsors, program leadership, and functional heads responsible for funding and delivery decisions.
Transformation Proposal.consulting_narrative: Current State → Opportunities → Future State → Roadmap → Next Steps

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Frame the transformation recommendation and the decision required.
Describe the current operating model and baseline performance.
Identify improvement opportunities and value drivers.
Articulate the target operating model and expected outcomes.
Outline the high-level implementation path and sequencing.
Define immediate actions, decision points, and accountabilities.

optional_slides.purpose: Surface key program risks and mitigation strategies.
optional_slides.trigger: The audience includes executives or board members who must approve funding.

optional_slides.purpose: Summarize the funding and resource profile required.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt explicitly asks for budget, investment, or resource requirements.

optional_slides.purpose: Quantify or categorize expected business benefits.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt asks for benefits, value case, or business case.

Digital Transformation.description: A transformation proposal focused on digital capabilities, automation, and technology-enabled change.
Digital Transformation.objective: Secure alignment on a prioritized digital transformation program.
Digital Transformation.consulting_narrative: Digital Baseline → Opportunity Areas → Target State → Enablers → Roadmap

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Frame the digital transformation recommendation.
Describe the current digital maturity and capability baseline.
Identify digital opportunity areas and value drivers.
Articulate the future digital operating model.
Define the technology, data, and people enablers required.
Sequence digital initiatives and milestones.

AI Strategy.description: A strategy deck that defines how an organization should adopt, scale, and govern AI to create business value.
AI Strategy.objective: Align {company}'s {business_function} leadership on an AI-enabled roadmap and governance model.
AI Strategy.expected_audience: {company}'s {business_function} leadership, data and technology leaders, and AI program sponsors.
AI Strategy.consulting_narrative: Opportunity → AI Vision → Use Cases → Roadmap → Governance

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Summarize the AI strategy recommendation and expected outcomes.
Frame the AI opportunity for the business or function.
Describe the future AI-enabled operating model.
Prioritize AI use cases by value and feasibility.
Sequence AI initiatives and capability milestones.
Define data, risk, ethics, and operating governance.

optional_slides.purpose: Outline the data foundations and requirements for AI adoption.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions data, data strategy, or data readiness.

optional_slides.purpose: Address responsible AI, ethics, and risk guardrails.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions ethics, risk, responsible AI, or compliance.

optional_slides.purpose: Summarize the AI technology and platform considerations.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt asks about platforms, technology, or architecture.

Enterprise AI Strategy.description: A cross-functional AI strategy covering enterprise-wide adoption.
Enterprise AI Strategy.objective: Align the enterprise on a unified AI strategy and investment plan.
Enterprise AI Strategy.consulting_narrative: Enterprise Opportunity → AI Vision → Function Roadmaps → Governance → Value Realization

Function AI Strategy.description: An AI strategy scoped to a single business function.
Function AI Strategy.objective: Define a function-specific AI roadmap and quick wins.
Function AI Strategy.consulting_narrative: Function Baseline → AI Opportunities → Use Cases → Roadmap → Governance

Operating Model Assessment.description: A diagnostic deck that evaluates an organization's current operating model and defines a target state.
Operating Model Assessment.objective: Assess {company}'s {business_function} operating model and define a prioritized target-state design.
Operating Model Assessment.expected_audience: {company}'s {business_function} functional leadership, operating model owners, and transformation sponsors.
Operating Model Assessment.consulting_narrative: Current Operating Model → Assessment Framework → Findings → Target Operating Model → Implementation Implications

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Summarize the assessment scope, key findings, and recommended target state.
Describe the current organization, process, and capability model.
Present the dimensions used to evaluate the operating model.
Highlight strengths, gaps, and root causes.
Define the target design for people, process, and technology.
Outline the changes, investments, and risks to reach the target state.

optional_slides.purpose: State the principles guiding the target operating model design.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt asks for design principles or guiding principles.

optional_slides.purpose: Describe organizational structure and role implications.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions org design, roles, or organizational structure.

Target Operating Model.description: A forward-looking design of the target operating model, often following an assessment.
Target Operating Model.objective: Define and align stakeholders on the target operating model.
Target Operating Model.consulting_narrative: Design Principles → Target State → Capabilities → Enablers → Roadmap

Current State Assessment.description: A diagnostic deck that documents and evaluates the current state of a process, function, or capability.
Current State Assessment.objective: Establish a fact-based understanding of {company}'s {business_function} current state and identify improvement priorities.
Current State Assessment.expected_audience: {company}'s {business_function} process owners, functional leadership, and project teams.
Current State Assessment.consulting_narrative: Scope → Current Process → Pain Points → Assessment → Findings → Priorities

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Summarize the assessment scope and headline findings.
Define what is being assessed and the boundaries of the analysis.
Document the current process or capability flow.
Identify the key pain points and performance gaps.
Evaluate the current state against a framework or criteria.
Synthesize findings and root causes.
Rank improvement priorities for follow-on work.

optional_slides.purpose: Identify key stakeholders and their interests.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions stakeholders, RACI, or governance.

Future State Vision.description: A vision deck that paints the picture of a desired future state and the path to get there.
Future State Vision.objective: Align {company}'s stakeholders on a compelling {business_function} future-state vision and strategic direction.
Future State Vision.expected_audience: {company}'s senior leadership, {business_function} sponsors, and transformation teams.
Future State Vision.consulting_narrative: Strategic Context → Future State Vision → Capabilities → Enablers → Roadmap

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Summarize the future-state vision and strategic intent.
Set the business context and drivers for the future state.
Describe the aspirational future-state target.
Define the capabilities required in the future state.
Identify the people, process, data, and technology enablers.
Outline the journey to the future state.

optional_slides.purpose: Briefly contrast the current state with the future vision.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt asks to compare current and future state.

Target Operating Model Vision.description: A future-state vision focused on the target operating model.
Target Operating Model Vision.objective: Align stakeholders on the target operating model vision.
Target Operating Model Vision.consulting_narrative: Context → Design Principles → Target Model → Capabilities → Roadmap

Board Update.description: A concise status and decision deck for a board or steering committee audience.
Board Update.objective: Inform {company}'s board of {business_function} progress, surface risks, and secure required decisions.
Board Update.expected_audience: {company}'s Board of Directors and executive sponsors.
Board Update.consulting_narrative: Executive Summary → Progress → Risks → Decisions → Next Steps

default_slide_sequence.purpose: State the update objective and the one-line headline.
Highlight milestones achieved and status against plan.
Surface key risks, issues, and mitigations.
List decisions required from the board.
Define immediate actions and accountabilities.

optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions budget, financials, or investment.

optional_slides.purpose: Report on benefits achieved and expected.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions benefits, value, or outcomes.

Steering Committee Update.description: A working-level steering committee update with more operational detail.
Steering Committee Update.objective: Update the steering committee on progress, issues, and decisions.
Steering Committee Update.expected_audience: Steering committee members and program leadership.
Steering Committee Update.consulting_narrative: Status → Achievements → Blockers → Decisions → Next Steps

Capability Overview.description: A descriptive deck that maps an organization's capabilities and identifies gaps or priorities.
Capability Overview.objective: Provide {company}'s {business_function} leadership with a structured view of current and target capabilities.
Capability Overview.expected_audience: {company}'s {business_function} functional leadership, capability owners, and transformation teams.
Capability Overview.consulting_narrative: Capability Framework → Current Capabilities → Gaps → Target Capabilities → Roadmap

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Summarize the capability overview and key takeaways.
Present the capability model or taxonomy used.
Describe the current capability maturity and coverage.
Identify capability gaps and priority areas.
Define the target capability state.
Sequence capability-building initiatives.

optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions maturity or assessment.

Maturity Assessment.description: A diagnostic deck that evaluates capability or process maturity against a defined model.
Maturity Assessment.objective: Assess {company}'s {business_function} maturity, identify gaps, and define a path to target maturity.
Maturity Assessment.expected_audience: {company}'s {business_function} functional leadership, process owners, and improvement teams.
Maturity Assessment.consulting_narrative: Maturity Model → Current Maturity → Gap Analysis → Target Maturity → Improvement Roadmap

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Summarize maturity assessment scope and key findings.
Introduce the maturity framework and levels.
Assess current maturity across dimensions.
Identify gaps between current and target maturity.
Define the target maturity level and focus areas.
Sequence maturity improvement initiatives.

optional_slides.purpose: Compare maturity against industry or peer benchmarks.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions benchmark, industry comparison, or peer comparison.

Digital Maturity.description: A maturity assessment focused on digital capabilities.
Digital Maturity.objective: Assess digital maturity and define a digital acceleration path.
Digital Maturity.consulting_narrative: Digital Maturity Model → Current State → Gaps → Target → Roadmap

Due Diligence.description: An evaluation deck used to assess a target company, asset, or opportunity ahead of a transaction or decision.
Due Diligence.objective: Summarize due diligence findings and recommendations for {company}'s {business_function} decision-makers.
Due Diligence.expected_audience: {company}'s investment committees, deal teams, senior executives, and advisors for {business_function} matters.
Due Diligence.consulting_narrative: Scope & Approach → Market Overview → Target Profile → Operational Assessment → Risk Assessment → Key Findings → Recommendations

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Summarize the diligence objective, scope, and headline conclusion.
Define what was evaluated and how.
Provide context on the market and competitive landscape.
Describe the target company, asset, or opportunity.
Evaluate operations, capabilities, and performance.
Surface key risks and mitigating factors.
Synthesize the most important diligence findings.
State recommended actions or deal implications.

optional_slides.purpose: Summarize historical and projected financial performance.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt asks for financial, commercial, or valuation diligence.

optional_slides.purpose: Identify potential synergies and integration considerations.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions M&A, acquisition, merger, or synergies.

Commercial Due Diligence.description: Due diligence focused on market, customers, and commercial performance.
Commercial Due Diligence.objective: Assess the commercial attractiveness and risks of the target.
Commercial Due Diligence.consulting_narrative: Market → Customers → Commercial Performance → Competitive Position → Risks → Conclusions

Technology Due Diligence.description: Due diligence focused on technology, systems, and digital capabilities.
Technology Due Diligence.objective: Evaluate technology assets, risks, and scalability.
Technology Due Diligence.consulting_narrative: Technology Landscape → Architecture → Capabilities → Risks → Investment Needs → Recommendations

Roadmap.description: A planning deck that defines initiatives, sequencing, and milestones to achieve a strategic objective.
Roadmap.objective: Communicate {company}'s {business_function} initiative roadmap, sequencing, and expected outcomes.
Roadmap.expected_audience: {company}'s {business_function} program leadership, functional sponsors, and execution teams.
Roadmap.consulting_narrative: Strategic Context → Initiatives → Sequencing → Roadmap → Outcomes

default_slide_sequence.purpose: Summarize the roadmap objective and headline outcomes.
Set the strategic drivers for the roadmap.
Define the initiatives or workstreams.
Explain the logic for ordering and prioritization.
Present the sequenced roadmap with milestones.
Define expected business outcomes and success metrics.

optional_slides.purpose: Highlight cross-initiative dependencies and critical path.
optional_slides.trigger: The prompt mentions dependencies, critical path, or interdependencies.
The prompt mentions budget, investment, or resources.

Implementation Roadmap.description: A detailed execution roadmap with phases and deliverables.
Implementation Roadmap.objective: Guide execution teams through phased delivery.
